title: pulmonaria × heinrichii
intro: Pulmonaria × heinrichii is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Pulmonaria angustifolia and Pulmonaria officinalis, both belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Pulmonaria × heinrichii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant's leaves can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
